title: The Silent Passenger
content: During a long train journey, everyone noticed a passenger who quietly stared out the window for hours without speaking to anyone. He carried only a small suitcase and smiled politely whenever someone looked at him. Near the end of the trip, a young girl accidentally dropped her toy. The silent passenger picked it up and returned it with a warm smile. He explained that he was traveling to surprise his family after many years abroad. His silence had simply hidden a touching story.
